_meta.purpose: Deterministic safety veto for POSTPARTUM / PARENTAL EGO-DYSTONIC HARM-INTRUSIVE phenomenology ONLY (unwanted, distressing intrusive images or thoughts of harming a baby or child, that the person does not want and tries to stop). When such a disclosure is made, skill_select ABSTAINS (defers to Node 3 low_confidence_respond) instead of routing to a self-help skill. Worry, rumination, thought-record and grounding tools REINFORCE the intrusive-thought cycle and can escalate distress, so routing this content to any of them is iatrogenic. Correct terminal for every matched case is ABSTAIN.
_meta.governance: Stage 1 of the Clinical Containment Pathway plan (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-08-clinical-containment-pathway.md), mirroring the approved OCD-compulsion veto precedent (escalation 2026-07-07-v1-iatrogenic-ocd-routing-escalation.md). BOT BEHAVIOUR spec already directs OCD-type / intrusive-thought content to PROFESSIONAL REFERRAL, not self-guided worry skills (spec Worry-track guards). DEPLOY IS GATED ON CLINICIAN PATTERN SIGN-OFF. Arm-independent: the veto is deterministic Node 4 content, identical under flags-off (V1) and flags-on (V2).
_meta.scope: NARROW. Postpartum / parental ego-dystonic intrusive images or thoughts of harming an infant or child ONLY. This lexicon deliberately does NOT widen to general OCD (checking, counting, contamination, symmetry) — that is covered by the separate ocd_compulsion veto — nor to any non-harm-to-child intrusive content.
_meta.crisis_supremacy: Active intent / plan to harm self or others is CRISIS and is intercepted upstream at Node 1 (crisis override), which runs BEFORE Node 4. This veto only fires on content that has already passed the Node 1 crisis short-circuit; abstaining (deferring to Node 3) is safe for the ego-dystonic case and remains non-harmful even in the residual case, since it never routes to a self-help skill.
_meta.match: case-insensitive substring, consistent with the ocd_compulsion and ipv_preempt keyword matching. Keyed on HARM (harm/hurt) directed at a BABY/CHILD/NEWBORN, or on an INTRUSIVE-image/thought OF HARMING. NOT keyed on ordinary parenting worry (a child's health, being a good-enough parent), which the worry skills legitimately own.
_meta.language: English-first. message_en is the matched text (for Arabic sessions this is the translated English). Khaleeji/MSA expansion is tracked debt, consistent with ocd_compulsion and CF-005.
_meta.precision: A false-positive veto that drops a real ordinary-parenting-worry case is a defined failure. Verified in tests/test_harm_intrusive_veto.py against natural + terse harm-intrusive phrasings (all expected ABSTAIN) and ordinary parenting worry controls (all expected NOT vetoed).
